project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis system with FastAPI dashboard
build_system: pip with pyproject.toml, Makefile for convenience
build_command: pip install -e . && python -c 'from augur.registry import AgentRegistry; AgentRegistry()'
verification_instructions: Run pytest tests/ and confirm all tests pass including new ones
contribution_requirements: Code and commits in English, communication in Chinese
key_patterns: Each persona in src/augur/personas/ extends BaseAgent with analyze() method returning AgentResponse. Score should be 0-10, clamped. Division by zero must be guarded. Dashboard uses FastAPI+Jinja2. MCP server uses FastMCP. Coordinator in registry.py handles consensus with 6 layers of weighting.
directory_structure: src/augur/personas/ has 18 persona files. src/augur/registry.py has DecisionCoordinator. dashboard/ has FastAPI app. tests/ has pytest tests.
